title: add_dops
description: Append a raw dops statement (a single line or a whole heredoc block) to overlay.dops. The statement is validated against the engine grammar after placement; a malformed statement is rolled back. Use this for any additive directive that has no bespoke intent (conditional control, target heredocs, file directives, etc.).

dops.description: A dops statement in engine grammar: a single line ('mk set FOO "bar"') or a complete heredoc block ('mk target set NAME <<'MK1'\n...\nMK1'). Prefer one statement per call so each is validated and rolled back independently; a multi-statement payload is accepted (the whole append is atomic) but loses that granularity.

scope.description: Target build line for this statement. '@any' (default) applies universally on every build. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
